lines.speaker: Captain Rovin
lines.text: What are you doing up here? Only the palace guards are allowed up here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am one of the palace guards.

lines.speaker: Captain Rovin
lines.text: No, you're not! I know all the palace guards.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm a new recruit.

lines.speaker: Captain Rovin
lines.text: I interview all the new recruits. I'd know if you were one of them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That blows that story out of the water then.

lines.speaker: Captain Rovin
lines.text: Get out of my sight.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've had extensive plastic surgery.

lines.speaker: Captain Rovin
lines.text: What sort of surgery is that? I've never heard of it. Besides, you look reasonably healthy.

lines.speaker: Captain Rovin
lines.text: Why is this relevant anyway? You still shouldn't be here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What about the King? Surely you'd let him up here.

lines.speaker: Captain Rovin
lines.text: Well, yes, I suppose we'd let him up. He doesn't generally want to come up here, but if he did want to, he could.

lines.speaker: Captain Rovin
lines.text: Anyway, you're not the King either. So get out of my sight.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I know, but this is important.

lines.speaker: Captain Rovin
lines.text: Ok, I'm listening. Tell me what's so important.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Erm I forgot.

lines.speaker: Captain Rovin
lines.text: Well it can't be that important then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you know?

lines.speaker: Captain Rovin
lines.text: Just go away.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The castle has just received its ale delivery.

lines.speaker: Captain Rovin
lines.text: Now that is important. However I'm the wrong person to speak to about it. Go talk to the kitchen staff.
